title: OneMine
body:
This is my Resource pack based off the game, **[Oneshot](https://store.steampowered.com/app/420530/OneShot/)**! This resource pack make the UI similar to the UI from OneShot. Check the gallery to see what it looks like! This resource pack also adds some small things from OneShot: * Sheep have new sounds * New Title Screen splashes! * New Sound effects  Click the spoiler to see all the new Title Screen splashes
Spoiler Not a cat!
Pancakes > Waffles
We miss you Felix!
Also wishlist Margin of the Strange!
We ride at dawn!
You only have one shot, Player.
Checkmate.
As seen on Steam!
HELLO.
As seen on Itch.io!
I can talk to God!
*confused cat noises*
## Credits **Future Cat LLC for OneShot** [Henkkuainen for the skin used in the Gallery!](https://www.planetminecraft.com/skin/niko-oneshot/)   **Will this recieve mod support? Will this be supported for later or older versions?** Depends on my free time. If you have a mod you want this to support, check the GitHub and send an issue, or send a comment (CurseForge and Planet Minecraft only) **This resource pack is offically hosted only on CurseForge, Modrinth, Planet Minecraft, and GitHub.**
